summary: Iter14 — 6 P2 polish items: full backend + frontend coverage. RESULT: ALL CHECKS PASS. Backend: 46/46 pytest cases (7 new iter14 public-auction gate tests + 24/24 iter13 module access regression + 15/15 iter10 regression). New /api/public/auction-status returns {locked:true} when visitor pwd set; /api/public/auction-items returns 401 without unlock_token and 200 with valid token; bad/empty token => 401; shared visitor token also unlocks /api/public/warehouse — confirming the warehouse+auction share one password. Frontend Playwright (1920x1080): Reports page renders 7 tabs each with distinct accent color when active (navy/green/terracotta/amber/violet/teal/sage as required); shortened receipt RC-2026-N + CT-2026-N pattern verified in Payments table (samples: RC-2026-51, CT-2026-112); Finance Invoices tab shows INV-2026-N short with full INV-2026-0013 in title attr; Items table 1st column is 'Photo' with placeholder squares (no items have photo_url in current data — placeholder branch verified); Inventory tab Category dropdown contains 'pezadu/Heavy Equipment'; Public /auction shows orange-card gate with auction-password input + auction-unlock-btn; unlocking with 'visitor42' reveals public-auction-grid + auction-filter-{all|car|motorcycle|electronic|pezadu} chips + auction-lock-again button; sessionStorage 'fp_warehouse_token' (132 chars) is set after unlock; lock-again returns to gate. ModuleGuard end-to-end: created TEST cashier with allowed_modules=[dashboard,payments], logged in, navigated to /clients /contracts /items /finance /reports /auctions /users /settings /audit-log — every route renders module-access-denied panel + module-denied-back button AND auto-redirects to /dashboard within 2.5s; /dashboard and /payments load normally with NO denied panel. Admin role bypasses ModuleGuard on all routes (verified admin reached /finance, /reports, /audit-log without any access-denied panel). Cleanup completed (cashier deleted, warehouse_password preserved at visitor42).
critical_code_review_comments: Naming inconsistency between review_request text labels and actual testids — Reports tabs use: report-tab-active-contracts (label 'Active Contract'), report-tab-auction (label 'Auctions'), report-tab-treasury (label 'Finance'). Review_request listed them as 'contracts/auctions/finance'. Not a functional bug — all 7 tabs render with the specified accent colors — but consider aligning testid keys with the user-visible labels for less surprise (e.g., report-tab-auctions plural to match the tab text).

AuctionPublic.js shares sessionStorage('fp_warehouse_token') with warehouse page — this is the intended behavior, but the token is stored unencrypted in sessionStorage. Acceptable for a visitor-grade gate (low-sensitivity public listing) but if the auction ever exposes contact info or buyer-only data, consider HttpOnly cookie + same-site instead.

ModuleGuard does NOT block API calls — it only renders a UI panel + redirects. The underlying API endpoints are already gated server-side (verified by iter13 tests returning 403). Good defense-in-depth, but be aware that toast.error fires inside useEffect on every render where allowed=false; if user navigates back-and-forth quickly between forbidden routes, multiple toasts may stack. Sonner deduplicates by default; non-blocking.

Items.js photo column placeholder uses dashed border div — verified rendering across all rows (current dataset has no photo_url). The img branch (40x40 clickable, opens full image in new tab) was not exercised because no seeded item has photo_url set. Recommend main agent seed at least one item with photo_url for visual smoke verification in future iterations.

Finance invoices: both 'INV-2026-13' (short) and 'INV-2026-0013' (full) appear in the page HTML — main visible cell uses short form, full form is in the title attribute for hover. Confirmed working as designed.
test_credentials: admin@fatinpenhores.tl / admin123 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Visitor password: visitor42 (set/verified by autouse fixture). Cashier created on-the-fly with prefix test_iter14_guard_* and deleted post-run.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST cashier (test_iter14_guard_<ts>@x.com) for ModuleGuard flow; deleted automatically at end of run. Also test_iter13 fixtures create several test_cashier/test_staff/test_pwd/test_promote/test_filter users and clean them up via fixture teardown. autouse fixture in iter14 ensures warehouse_password remains 'visitor42' (preserves test_credentials.md state).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter14 ships ModuleGuard (client-side route guard with toast+auto-redirect), public auction gate sharing the warehouse password (sessionStorage key 'fp_warehouse_token'), color-coded Reports tabs, shortened doc numbers (RC-/CT-/INV-2026-N), and Items photo thumbnail column. Key testids: auction-gate, auction-password, auction-unlock-btn, auction-filter-{all|car|motorcycle|electronic|pezadu}, public-auction-grid, public-auction-{id}, auction-lock-again, module-access-denied, module-denied-back, report-tab-{active-contracts|payments|overdue|auction|inventory|financial|treasury}. Backend test files reusable for regression: /app/backend/tests/test_iter14_auction_gate.py (7 tests, requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var). Note: pytest invocation must pass REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL explicitly — module-level os.environ.get(...).rstrip() crashes without it. Items thumbnail img branch was NOT tested visually (no item with photo_url in current DB); only placeholder branch verified.
rca of the issue: Not applicable — feature verification with zero defects found. All 14 bullet-pointed test cases from the review request pass exactly as specified.
